# Port target: `@eslint-community/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/eslint-community/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments` @ `v4.7.2` |
| Baseline npm version | `4.7.2` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 9 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `disable-enable-pair` | require a `eslint-enable` comment for every `eslint-disable` comment | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/disable-enable-pair.html) |
| 2 | `no-aggregating-enable` | disallow a `eslint-enable` comment for multiple `eslint-disable` comments | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/no-aggregating-enable.html) |
| 3 | `no-duplicate-disable` | disallow duplicate `eslint-disable` comments | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/no-duplicate-disable.html) |
| 4 | `no-restricted-disable` | disallow `eslint-disable` comments about specific rules | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/no-restricted-disable.html) |
| 5 | `no-unlimited-disable` | disallow `eslint-disable` comments without rule names | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/no-unlimited-disable.html) |
| 6 | `no-unused-disable` | disallow unused `eslint-disable` comments | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/no-unused-disable.html) |
| 7 | `no-unused-enable` | disallow unused `eslint-enable` comments | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/no-unused-enable.html) |
| 8 | `no-use` | disallow ESLint directive-comments | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/no-use.html) |
| 9 | `require-description` | require include descriptions in ESLint directive-comments | [docs](https://eslint-community.github.io/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments/rules/require-description.html) |
